changeSet.author: openelis-separation

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%Bioequivalence%' OR title LIKE '%Bioequivalence%Bioanalytical%'

changeSet.comment: Separate existing notebooks with combined bioanalytical and bioequivalence titles
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.notebook SET title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory', content = REPLACE(content, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), content = REPLACE(content, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), objective = REPLACE(objective, 'bioanalytical and pharmaceutical quality testing', 'bioanalytical testing'), objective = REPLACE(objective, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), objective = REPLACE(objective, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), protocol = REPLACE(protocol, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), protocol = REPLACE(protocol, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), last_updated = ${now} WHERE (title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%Bioequivalence%' OR title LIKE '%Bioequivalence%Bioanalytical%') AND is_template = false;

UPDATE clinlims.notebook_page np SET instructions = REPLACE(instructions, 'bioequivalence study', 'analytical study'), instructions = REPLACE(instructions, 'Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), instructions = REPLACE(instructions, 'bioequivalence', 'bioanalytical'), content = REPLACE(content, 'Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), content = REPLACE(content, 'bioequivalence', 'bioanalytical'), last_updated = ${now} FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = false AND (np.instructions LIKE '%bioequivalence%' OR np.content LIKE '%bioequivalence%');

rollback.sql: UPDATE clinlims.notebook SET title = 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence Laboratory', content = REPLACE(content, 'Bioanalytical Laboratory', 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence Laboratory'), objective = REPLACE(objective, 'bioanalytical testing', 'bioanalytical and pharmaceutical quality testing'), protocol = REPLACE(protocol, 'Bioanalytical Laboratory', 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence Laboratory'), last_updated = ${now} WHERE title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND is_template = false;

changeSet.author: openelis-separation

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%Bioequivalence%' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Clean up template notebook titles to ensure separation
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.notebook SET title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory', content = REPLACE(content, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), content = REPLACE(content, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), objective = REPLACE(objective, 'bioanalytical and pharmaceutical quality testing', 'bioanalytical testing'), objective = REPLACE(objective, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), objective = REPLACE(objective, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), protocol = REPLACE(protocol, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), protocol = REPLACE(protocol, 'Bioanalytical & Bioequivalence', 'Bioanalytical'), last_updated = ${now} WHERE title LIKE '%Bioanalytical%Bioequivalence%' AND is_template = true;
